evals.prompt: Faz um commit pra mim. Mudei só o arquivo src/auth/login.ts pra corrigir um bug no token expiry, e também atualizei o README com a instrução de uso.
evals.expected_output: Generates a single-line conventional commit message like 'fix(auth): correct token expiry validation', shows it to the user for confirmation, checks staging, and commits.

evals.prompt: Preciso commitar. Refatorei bastante coisa: separei a lógica de negócio dos controllers em services (auth, user, order, product), adicionei um BaseService, e atualizei os testes unitários dos 4 módulos.
evals.expected_output: Detects > 3 files changed, generates a list-format commit message starting with 'refactor: extract service layer from controllers' followed by bullet points per module, shows for confirmation, then commits.

evals.prompt: commita as mudanças aí. Mas não rodei git add ainda.
evals.expected_output: Checks staging area (empty), runs git diff --stat to understand changes, then informs user it will run git add -A. If sensitive files like .env are in the diff, shows a warning before staging. Generates appropriate commit message and confirms before committing.
